code-runner.executorMap.python: cd "$workspaceRoot" && rel="$fullFileName" && rel="${rel#\"}" && rel="${rel%\"}" && case "$rel" in "$workspaceRoot"/*) rel="${rel#$workspaceRoot/}" ;; *) echo "Current file is outside workspace; cannot convert to module path."; exit 1 ;; esac && mod="${rel%.py}" && mod="${mod//\//.}" && uv run -m "$mod"
